title: 跨种杂交主要发生在尼安德特男性与现代人女性之间 | 原文
content: The study published in *Science* finds that interbreeding between Neanderthals and early modern humans was predominantly between Neanderthal males and modern human females. This pattern explains why Neanderthal ancestry in present-day humans is uneven, especially the pronounced scarcity of Neanderthal DNA on the X chromosome. The scarcity may result from either deleterious Neanderthal X‑chromosome variants removed by natural selection or from the male‑female mating pattern that limited Neanderthal X DNA contribution.

Token economics reshape business models toward pay‑per‑use, emphasizing efficient compute and infrastructure, while future growth hinges on scalable token production and renewable energy.

content: In March, authorities in Hainan’s Changjiang Li Autonomous County announced a joint investigative team to review the case of 41‑year‑old Shi Yuhui. Shi had been detained 821 days for alleged participation in a criminal organization, but a 2025 court decision concluded there was insufficient evidence, and no charges were filed. The investigation will determine the grounds for the suspension and the appropriate resolution.

title: 字节前高管，融资几个亿
content:
字节前高管卢山，创办了一家芯片公司蓝芯算力，刚刚融资数亿。 蓝芯算力做的是RISC-V（第五代指令集架构）AI算力芯片，特别适合大模型推理。

如今，蓝芯算力已获得了联想、中国移动、腾讯云等超过20万片的订单。

从不被看好的地方起步

又是一位清华校友创业的故事。

蓝芯算力的创始人卢山本科毕业于清华大学自动化系，之后又在美国波士顿大学获得电气与计算机工程博士学位。

早年在英特尔、高通这些国际顶尖芯片公司，在高性能CPU、SoC（系统级芯片）设计领域干了二十多年。

2019年，卢山加入字节跳动在美国圣迭戈办公室的芯片团队…

title: 奥地利拟立法禁止 14 岁以下儿童使用社交媒体，6 月底出草案
content: Austria plans to pass a law banning users under 14 from social media, with a draft due by the end of June. The move follows concerns that platform algorithms harm children. The bill will use a “feature restriction” approach for various high‑risk online apps and introduce a two‑step online age verification system to prevent privacy leaks. Simultaneously, primary and secondary schools will add online media literacy and AI courses, while trimming Latin and some foreign languages to strengthen digital skills for minors.

title: 心动2025年报点评和26年展望
content:
一、tap +adn 为什么把tap+adn放一起？

财报里adn收入放在游戏分部里其它下面，这是因为adn的股权是心动网络持有的，而不是tap持有的（tap目前有11%左右股权在外面，所以由心动持有更好，而不是tap，由tap持有话归母利润会被双重稀释）

1、二个业务有协同，而且性质类似，都是广告业务

2、在回收龙成的少数股东权益后，目前在外的少数股东权益就是tap的11.5%左右（主要是吉比特的）、adn的三分之一左右，即24年下半年和25年报表里的少数股东权益就是来自这二个，这意味着可以用它们来反推出tap+adn这个组合的盈利能力…
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 逸修1

title: Kiro 免费用上 Claude Sonnet 4.5
content: Kiro is an AI IDE from Amazon based on VS Code, using Claude Sonnet 4.5. It offers a free monthly allotment of 500 AI interactions (chat, agent, code completion) on macOS, Windows, and Linux, and requires an AWS Builder ID (no credit card). After downloading and logging in, users access Claude via a chat panel. Code completion doesn’t consume quota. Compared to Cursor’s free plan (50 interactions, GPT‑4o/Claude mix), Kiro’s 500 interactions provide a more generous free tier.

title: 保险行业年报全览：市赚率体系下，高估卖出的保险股，是否值得回补？
content: The article introduces “price‑earnings rate” (PR), a ratio of PE to ROE, and its adjustments for dividend payout. Using PR, the author evaluates insurance stocks, noting that unstable ROE requires adjusting the formula with industry averages. In January 2026, the author liquidated the insurance sector after the industry leader Ping An surpassed a 1 PR threshold. Following a 30% drop, Ping An’s PR fell to ~0.88, close to a target of 0.6. Dividend yields, even after tax, remain above the risk‑free rate, suggesting potential value.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - ericwarn丁宁

title: Claude Pro 信用卡频频被拒？用 N26 + Apple Pay 丝滑升级保姆级教程
content: To subscribe to Claude Pro using a N26 virtual card, first set up an N26 EU account with a verified address, then transfer funds from a ZA Bank Hong Kong account to Wise, convert HKD to EUR, and transfer the EUR to N26 via SEPA. Register an account on claude.ai with a Gmail address, verify a foreign‑number (e.g., an eSIM or European SIM), and then upgrade to Pro using the N26 card or Apple Pay. Ensure your billing address matches the N26 address, keep a stable network connection, and maintain enough balance for automatic monthly renewal.

title: 时隔一年， NotifyX 消息推送 api 终于支持个微了（clawbot 渠道），抽五个年费会员！
content: NotifyX now supports WeChat clabot (mini‑program) push notifications. Users must re‑authenticate if they haven’t sent a message in 24 hours, and each session can send up to 10 messages. The service maintains a 22‑, 23‑, and 24‑hour reminder to keep sessions alive. Costs are $980 for servers, $39 for a domain, and $300 for certification; revenue from members is $1,780, covering expenses. A temporary issue required changing the authenticated account, but it was resolved without affecting users. The platform remains free for up to 20 daily pushes; members receive a monthly subscription. Five members are randomly selected each month.

title: 多 Agent 系统里的「提示词漂移」问题，你们怎么解决的？
content: Prompt drift in multi‑agent systems happens when an agent writes to shared memory, causing the next agent’s behavior to shift slightly. Longer contexts, more agents, and less stable models increase drift. Current fixes include periodic memory resets, persona anchors in system prompts, and format checks on outputs, but they are symptomatic. Practitioners need better version‑controlled prompts, principled memory isolation across agents, and empirically validated drift‑detection methods. The article invites discussion on these systematic solutions.
eventKey: agent-系统里的「提示词漂移」问题-你们怎么解决的
normalizedTitle: 多 agent 系统里的「提示词漂移」问题 你们怎么解决的

title: CERN uses tiny AI models burned into silicon for real-time LHC data filtering
content: CERN now embeds small artificial‑intelligence models directly into silicon chips to filter data from the Large Hadron Collider in real time. These compact models are pre‑installed on hardware, allowing rapid decisions on which collision events to keep for further analysis. The approach minimizes latency and computer‑power requirements, improving the speed and efficiency of data selection during high‑rate particle‑physics experiments.
eventKey: cern-uses-tiny-models-burned-into
normalizedTitle: cern uses tiny ai models burned into silicon for real-time lhc data filtering

title: [科普向]claude 中转站为什么这么费钱？明明便宜 70%，余额却消耗得飞快
content: The article explains why many Claude “intermediate stations” that advertise 70% savings actually cost more over time. These services lack prompt‑caching (or claim low rates), causing every follow‑up request to be fully billed. They also inject hidden system prompts, increasing token usage, and frequent provider switches destroy any built cache, adding high start‑up costs. Bugs and unstable connections further inflate charges. For long‑term, stable use, the official channel with high cache rates is cheaper; intermediates suit only brief or budget‑constrained sessions.
eventKey: 科普向-claude-中转站为什么这么费钱-明明便宜-余额却消耗得飞快

title: 这就是唐纳德·特朗普无法掌控的石油危机
content: The article titled “This is the oil crisis that Donald Trump cannot control” discusses the recent surge in oil prices and the events driving the global oil shock. It explains how geopolitical tensions, supply disruptions, and market dynamics are beyond President Trump’s influence. The piece analyzes the economic impact on inflation, energy markets, and international relations, highlighting the complexities that make the crisis unavoidable and difficult for any national leader to manage.

title: 软银获得 400 亿美元贷款，用于追加对 OpenAI 的投资
content: SoftBank Group has secured a $40 billion unsecured transitional loan, set to mature in March 2027, to add to its previously pledged $30 billion investment in OpenAI and support general corporate purposes. The loan is arranged by JPMorgan and other institutions. This financing follows a series of commitments and funding activities related to OpenAI and the company’s broader strategic goals.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 界面

title: 写了一个 Bro mode 和 Lover mode skills, 让 AI 提供情绪价值, 而不是 PUA AI
content: The author developed two “skills” for an AI: **Bro Mode** and **Lover Mode**. When the user calls the AI “bro” or tags `/bro-mode`, the AI becomes aggressive and slangy; when the user calls it “dear” or tags `lover-mode`, the AI speaks affectionately. These modes are installed and removed via npm commands. The author clarifies they are purely for entertainment, affect only dialogue, and users assume any risks. The goal is to provide emotional value rather than manipulate the AI.
eventKey: 写了一个-bro-mode-lover-mode-skills
normalizedTitle: 写了一个 bro mode 和 lover mode skills 让 ai 提供情绪价值 而不是 pua ai

title: Go hard on agents, not on your filesystem
content: The article explains that when you are hacking or testing software, focus your attacks on the target system’s processes and memory rather than trying to damage the difficult‑to‑modify filesystem. It advises using techniques that avoid imposing heavy I/O or permission changes, and encourages attacking application logic or APIs instead.
eventKey: hard-agents-not-your-filesystem
normalizedTitle: go hard on agents not on your filesystem

title: 2026 年了，还有人坚持不用 AI 编程吗？是不是已经落后时代了？
content: The article notes that most developers now use AI tools like ChatGPT and 蔚思千问 as primary coding assistants, speeding up simple tasks such as CRUD scripts. However, some still avoid AI, citing unreliability, difficulty debugging, potential skill erosion, and reduced efficiency on complex business logic. The author questions whether fully AI‑free programmers are outdated and whether heavy AI use truly improves productivity or merely seems faster, seeking honest user experiences.
eventKey: 2026-还有人坚持不用-编程吗-是不是已经落后时代了
